_mix: 5 instrumentaux / 5 avec paroles — mix intelligent genres & moods

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Dusty highway, windows down
Your boots up on the dash
We left that little one-horse town
With nothing but our cash
The radio is playing something
We both know every word
Singing loud and out of tune
The sweetest thing I've heard

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't need a map
I don't need a plan
Just your hand in mine
And the promised land

[Chorus]
Dusty highway, take me home
To the place where the wild flowers grow
Dusty highway, you and me
Chasing sunsets running free
We ain't got much but we got enough
Dusty highway, dusty love

[Verse 2]
Gas station coffee, two AM
Your head against my sleeve
The stars out here are bigger
Than anything I could believe
We pulled off by a river
Let the engine cool and rest
You whispered something quiet
That I'm keeping in my chest

[Chorus]
Dusty highway, take me home
To the place where the wild flowers grow
Dusty highway, you and me
Chasing sunsets running free
We ain't got much but we got enough
Dusty highway, dusty love

[Bridge]
Maybe we'll run out of road
Maybe we'll run out of gas
But I wouldn't trade a single mile
For anything in my past

[Outro]
Dusty highway, dusty love
Dusty highway, dusty love

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
La noche cae y tú llegas
Con esa mirada que me quema
No digas nada solo acércate
El silencio dice lo que sientes

[Pre-Chorus]
Despacio no hay prisa
Cada segundo es fuego
Tu piel contra la mía
Quemamos sin remedio

[Chorus]
Fuego lento fuego lento
Quemándonos por dentro
Fuego lento fuego lento
Nos consume el momento
No pares no pares
Que la noche es nuestra
Fuego lento fuego lento

[Verse 2]
Las luces bajan el calor sube
Tu sombra y la mía se confunden
El beat nos lleva a otro lugar
Donde solo existe este compás

[Chorus]
Fuego lento fuego lento
Quemándonos por dentro
Fuego lento fuego lento
Nos consume el momento
No pares no pares
Que la noche es nuestra
Fuego lento fuego lento

[Bridge]
Y si mañana no existe
Que importa que importa
Esta noche somos fuego
Que nunca se apaga

[Outro]
Fuego lento fuego lento
Quemando quemando

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Alarm at five no snooze I'm up
Cold water face splash fill the cup
While they sleeping I've been making moves
Built different baby I got nothing to prove
Laptop open markets red or green
Every loss a lesson every win a dream
They called me crazy back in twenty-three
Now they're asking how I got the key

[Pre-Chorus]
I don't talk about it
I just show the proof
Every single morning
Raise the roof

[Chorus]
Built different yeah I'm built different
Every day I'm on a mission
Built different can't you see the vision
Turning pressure into diamond precision
Built different built different
No excuses no permission
Built different built different
This is more than just ambition

[Verse 2]
Journal open write the goals today
Meditate and then I start to pray
Coffee black the mind is razor-sharp
This ain't luck I engineered the art
They want the life but skip the sacrifice
I paid in full at twice the price
Every no I heard became a bridge
Now I'm standing on the highest ridge

[Chorus]
Built different yeah I'm built different
Every day I'm on a mission
Built different can't you see the vision
Turning pressure into diamond precision
Built different built different
No excuses no permission
Built different built different
This is more than just ambition

[Bridge]
They don't see the three AM
They don't know the fight within
But the results speak loud
I was born to win

[Outro]
Built different built different
Always on a mission
